description: AlembicAgent Core consumer boundary. Agent code must consume stable @alembic/core facades instead of Core shared, service, or infrastructure internals. The lint default already denies every non-stable subpath that is not allowlisted here.

notes.baselineScan: Frozen 2026-06-11 from the real import scan of src/test/scripts: 248 files, 51 @alembic/core references, all stable-public; lint run: npm run lint:core-import-boundary --format json.
notes.stableFacadeEntries: Entries for stable facades record the frozen baseline counts. The Core lint always allows stable facades and skips them in the limit check today; the counts become enforced ratchets automatically if Core ever demotes a facade from stable.
notes.zeroLimitEntries: Entries with limit 0 are enforced deny rules: these Core internal subpaths must never be imported by Agent code. Any occurrence fails the lint with 'Reference limit exceeded: N found, baseline allows 0'.
notes.newImports: A new non-stable @alembic/core subpath import fails by default. If a legitimate import must be added, record it here with a reason instead of loosening the gate to empty.
notes.sharedTaxonomyAdoption: Calibrated 2026-06-12 (P3 plugin train): @alembic/core/shared limit 0->1. The original consumer is src/agent/runtime/AgentInterfaceContract.ts:1-7, a multi-line import of CORE_FAILURE_TAXONOMY / CORE_D25_REQUIRED_FAILURE_KINDS / CORE_FAILURE_TAXONOMY_VERSION and their types — the IC4 taxonomy adoption surface, intended usage. PCI-5 cleanup on 2026-06-15 moves src/ai/AiProvider.ts LanguageService from retired @alembic/core/project-intelligence to the surviving generic shared route, so @alembic/core/shared is now intentionally 2 while @alembic/core/project-intelligence is ratcheted to 0.
